step.name: scaffold-skeleton
step.action: Run scaffold-go.sh: create cmd/<each binary>/, internal/, migrations/, .github/, README.md, Makefile, .golangci.yml.

step.name: wire-entry-points
step.action: Each cmd/<name>/main.go calls config.Load + dependency wiring + app.Run(ctx). Business logic stays out.

step.name: partition-internal
step.action: Create internal/<feature>/ packages per aggregate (orders, payments, users). Shared types go in internal/shared/. No feature imports another feature directly.

step.name: makefile-targets
step.action: Author Makefile: build (all binaries), test, lint (golangci-lint run), run/<binary>, docker.
step.decision-gate: If a workflow doesn't fit a Makefile target, add the target — don't reach for ad-hoc scripts.

step.name: enforce-import-boundaries
step.action: Configure import-boundary linter (e.g. golangci-lint depguard or fgprof) to block cross-feature imports. Run in CI.
